I think the current universal choice is kathi:  kathigu-ra E3 (that is, base kathi, and pull 3 copies of her)

You may look first at Cheri's guide (see likes above given by the bot) for a first, reliable opinion on the character.

Tulu is more a support, which mean: he doesn't define your team.
The first thing you must wonder is "who is my attacker?", and then figure if Tulu is a good support for it

sadly, nyo, classes are more like a suggestion
goliath is actually an exalt support: you exalt him (ultimate), and he gives you a boost

Winkle works BECAUSE my team setup optimize her.... High Aliemus regen, feeding Casiah, that feed the hand, so E2 Psyche Reforged is heavily pumped up.
If I remove Casiah or Horla, Winkle isn't barely enough to keep the team alive.
And if I put a DPS that need the hand, like Liz, Winkle's Psyche screw her.

So... I say Winkle is good... but in niche situations where the whole team allow her to do her max

You want a Corpo
Discard posse (discard your entire hand and draw the same number +2) that you get from completing chapter 3
The other two slots can be what you want between keyflare defensive units (Murphy/Clem), utility supports (Casiah/Miryam) and offensive supports (GMurphy/Tulu)
Other blue and ultra standard units can also be used in the team and each one has their own perks for the team !
Going Caro and Chaos is also a possible choice, good options are Ramona, Hameln, Tawil for Chaos and Thais, Pickman, Leigh for Caro
